channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipped, 14th March
item.description:
Dumped between 9.30am_12pm sat😂 Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way Relief Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

Food waste and rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cecilia Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Graffiti on wall, 14th March
item.description:
The graffiti has been on the wall for 2 weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Leathermarket Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: [Portable loo] on side - please can it be removed, 14th March
item.description:
[Portable loo] near dlr shaft on royal arsenal Clearly pushed or blown over Im assuming no one is trapped in it. But its a chemical toilet so probably needs removing given risk to environment if it leaks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Argyll Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road defect, 14th March

item.title: Rubbish dumping again, 14th March
item.description:
Once again there's a lot of rubbish outside number 18. Can they be fined? It's come from their own tipped over bin which has been left there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple fly tips along Mayplace Lane, 14th March
item.description:
Previously reported but removed from app ? Multiple fly tips are building up at the top end of Mayplace Lane 200mts from the Plum Lane junction. The longer these are left the more they attract other fly tips

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eglinton Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped at the top of the street, 14th March
item.description:
A sofa, mattress and some other bits have been dumped blocking pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gunton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste is accumulating and remains uncollected, 14th March
item.description:
Significant waste accumulation within the estate is contributing to a detrimental environment.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harrington Hill, Hackney, London

item.title: Large pothole, 14th March

item.title: Dead fox, 14th March
item.description:
Dead fox in garden. Advised to double bin bag and leave at front
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prince's Plain, Bromley Common, Greater London

item.title: Smashed glass on pavement, 14th March
item.description:
Has been there for over a week and is hazardous, situated at the end of Haysleigh Gardens near mini roundabout

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Haysleigh Gardens, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Central white line on Willow Grove, 14th March
item.description:
The central white line is very faded down Willow Grove from Wirral Wood Close towards Willow Vale. As a result vehicles drive over the middle when approaching the sharp bend outside Coopers Cob which is causing near misses. Please can the central line be repainted and SLOW markings be added before the bend on each carriageway? Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willow Grove, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
